entry.content: invoice invoice_code customer_name subject issue_date(int) due_date(int) status remarks sub_total(int) tax_amount(int) total_amount(int) issue_date_desc(desc) due_date_desc(desc) total_amount_desc(desc) record{} record_code description quantity(int) unit unit_price(int) tax_rate(int) bank bank_code bank_title branch_code branch_name bank_type bank_number bank_name bank_label is_default(boolean) company email company_code company_name zip_code prefecture city address_line1 building_name tel fax registration_number user uid user_name quotation quotation_code customer_name subject issue_date(int) delivery_date(int) expiry_date(int) payment_terms status remarks sub_total(int) tax_amount(int) total_amount(int) issue_date_desc(desc) total_amount_desc(desc) company_group company_id owner_id role status company_name purchase_order purchase_order_code customer_name subject issue_date(int) delivery_date(int) delivery_location status remarks sub_total(int) tax_amount(int) total_amount(int) issue_date_desc(desc) total_amount_desc(desc) customer customer_code customer_name to_email cc_email customer_email{} email label
entry.rights: invoice.issue_date_desc:^/invoice invoice.due_date_desc:^/invoice invoice.customer_name;^/invoice invoice.subject;^/invoice invoice.total_amount_desc:^/invoice customer.customer_name;^/customer
